content.problemStatement: Write a C program that calculates and prints the sum of all even numbers from 1 to a given positive integer n. Use a while loop to iterate through the numbers.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Sum of even numbers from 2 to 6 is 2 + 4 + 6 = 12
Sum of even numbers from 2 to 10 is 2 + 4 + 6 + 8 + 10 = 30
No even numbers from 2 to 1, so sum is 0

solution.approach: The solution uses a while loop to iterate through all even numbers from 2 to the given positive integer n, adding each number to a running sum.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
sum = 0
i = 2

while i <= n:
    sum += i
    i += 2

print(sum)
